name: Water Polo Ragdoll
author: Poki
description: Jump in the pool and get ready for Water Polo Ragdoll! In this wacky water polo game, you throw yourself around the pool to try and score! Be the first one to score 5 points and you're the winner! You can play by yourself agains the computer, or grab a friend to see who the real water polo star is. Need some help to get the upper hand? Try to get some power ups, they can really turn the tide! Let's make a splash! How to play Water Polo Ragdoll? Use the mouse, the A/D keys or the left and right arrow keys to fling yourself around! Who created Water Polo Ragdoll? Water Polo Ragdoll was created by Ventorous. Play their other game on Poki: Catpad , Cubies and Zooplop How can I play Water Polo Ragdoll for free? You can play Water Polo Ragdoll for free on Poki. Can I play Water Polo Ragdoll on mobile devices and desktop? Water Polo Ragdoll can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Water Polo Ragdoll with my friend? Yes! Water Polo Ragdoll is a local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer!
